query: Correct course — playtesting showed our stamina mechanic kills the fun and we want to cut it mid-sprint. Help me navigate the change.
We hit a significant mid-sprint change and need a Sprint Change Proposal with impact analysis across the GDD and epics.
Propose a sprint change: assess the blast radius of removing the stamina system across our stories and artifacts before we commit.
Create the next story for the parry mechanic in our sprint.
Check whether our GDD and epics are ready to start production.
Run a retrospective on the epic we just shipped.
